subject: [N5] 34 action items from 2025-10-27 external-gabi
body:
Hi V,

I extracted 34 action items from your 2025-10-27 external-gabi meeting (20251028-132902_Meetings).
Please review and reply with your approval:

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

**1. # B01: DETAILED_RECAP**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 meeting
   📝 From meeting recap...

**2. ## Key Decisions and Agreements**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

**3. **Dual Zo Setup Strategy**: Gabi will create two separate Zo instances - one for Blue Tulip (consulting business) and one personal. This allows clean separation of client work from personal projects, with potential for secure data bridge between instances later.**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

**4. **Account Creation Completed**: Gabi successfully created Zo account (handle: gabbyzset), connected Google Calendar, Drive, and Gmail, selected Basic plan with 50% discount code (VATT50), resulting in $9/month pricing.**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Networking | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

**5. **Pause on Full N5 Installation**: Installation attempt revealed system complexity issues when transferring Vrijen's N5 system. Agreed to pause, let Vrijen troubleshoot the bootstrap errors, and resume in 1-2 days once fixed.**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

**6. **GitHub Account Creation**: Gabi will create GitHub account in preparation for future technical work, despite not having needed one previously. This represents a meaningful step toward technical literacy.**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

**7. **Claude Subscription Hold**: Gabi will maintain her existing $20/month Claude subscription temporarily until project file system is properly set up in Zo, then evaluate cancellation. Logan also has Claude workflows to show Gabi on Wednesday.**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

**8. ## Strategic Context**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

**9. This was Gabi's first exposure to Zo Computer, positioned as a more powerful alternative to her current Claude setup. The meeting revealed several strategic dynamics:**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 meeting
   📝 From meeting recap...

**10. For Gabi**: She's an AI consultant (Blue Tulip) looking to level up her technical infrastructure to better serve clients. The dual-instance strategy suggests she's thinking about scalability and professional boundaries. Her willingness to learn GitHub signals genuine commitment to expanding technical capabilities despite being "non-technical."**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

**11. For Vrijen's N5 System**: This onboarding exposed a critical challenge - the system has evolved to such complexity that simply "copying it over" breaks. This is a key inflection point for productization. The attempted bootstrap revealed dependencies and configurations that aren't yet portable. This is valuable feedback for making the system transferable to others.**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Product | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

**12. Positioning Insight**: Vrijen positioned himself to both Gabi and the Zo team (who were listening) as a "maker and breaker of systems" who builds custom quality-of-life features on top of Zo's base functionality. He's effectively becoming a solutions architect / professional services layer for Zo Computer.**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Product | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

**13. Community Dynamics**: Vrijen mentioned Logan has "her own crazy system in Claude" and is "super bullish on Claude." This suggests there's a micro-community of AI power users (Logan, Vrijen, Gabi) who are experimenting with different infrastructure approaches. The fact that Gabi is meeting with Logan separately indicates multiple paths to technical sophistication.**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 meeting
   📝 From meeting recap...

**14. ## Critical Next Action**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

**15. Owner**: Vrijen**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

**16. Deliverable**: Debug and fix N5 bootstrap script to handle clean system transfers**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

**17. Timeline**: 1-2 days**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

**18. Purpose**: Enable Gabi (and future users) to successfully install the N5 system layer on their Zo instances without manual intervention. This is essential for scaling Vrijen's solutions architect role and potentially creating a productized version of the N5 workflow system.**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Product | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

**19. No documents or links to attach with follow-up email**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 follow_up, deliverable
   📝 Deliverable from meeting...

**20. Primary deliverable is notification when technical issues resolved**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 deliverable
   📝 Deliverable from meeting...

**21. Follow-up should be brief check-in style, not document-heavy**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 15m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 follow_up, deliverable
   📝 Deliverable from meeting...

**22. ✅ Zo account created (gabbyzset), integrations connected, Basic plan with 50% discount**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Networking | 🏷 deliverable
   📝 Deliverable from meeting...

**23. ✅ Dual-instance strategy confirmed (Blue Tulip + personal)**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 deliverable
   📝 Deliverable from meeting...

**24. ⚠️ N5 installation paused due to system complexity issues**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 deliverable
   📝 Deliverable from meeting...

**25. **On my end**: I'm fixing the bootstrap script to handle clean transfers (1-2 days). I'll ping you when it's ready and we can resume.**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 deliverable
   📝 Deliverable from meeting...

**26. **On your end**: Feel free to experiment with base Zo in the meantime - test conversations, model selection (Sonnet vs Haiku), file management. Keep anything you want to save in case we need to wipe/reinstall.**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 deliverable
   📝 Deliverable from meeting...

**27. Warmth score: 6/10 (friendly professional tone, collaborative energy)**

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

**Reply with:**
• "approve all" → Push all to Akiflow
• "approve 1,34" → Push only #1 and #34
• "skip 2" → Don't create #2
• "edit 1: tomorrow 8am, 30m" → Modify then push

Or just reply "approved" and I'll push everything!

—Zo
